none.description: Disable Context7 prefetch for closure-only and docs-only review steps.

rust-cli-core.description: Rust and Clap docs for the `wave` CLI bootstrap and command tree.

libraries.queryHint: workspace layout, path handling, and filesystem IO for the `wave` CLI bootstrap
workspace manifests, binary targets, and test execution for the `wave` CLI package
derive parsers, subcommands, global flags, and help text for the `wave` CLI

rust-config-spec.description: Serde, TOML, and markdown parsing docs for typed project config and authored-wave contracts.

libraries.queryHint: filesystem IO, string parsing, and markdown section scanning for typed config and authored-wave docs
derive serialization, optional fields, and typed config models for project and wave specs
document parsing, value conversion, and config decoding for wave.toml and authored metadata

rust-control-plane.description: State modeling docs for queue projections, closure coverage, and JSON status views.

libraries.queryHint: queue reducers, ordering, and borrowed state structures for planning projections
serializable state records, optional fields, and stable wire-shape modeling for queue JSON
pretty-printing, JSON artifacts, and queue-status serialization

rust-async-runtime.description: Async runtime docs for launcher loops, Codex subprocess orchestration, and cancellation gates.

libraries.queryHint: process management, error handling, channels, and task coordination for launcher loops
async tasks, subprocess orchestration, timing loops, select patterns, and cancellation gates
spans, structured logs, subscriber wiring, and runtime instrumentation for launcher debugging

rust-tui.description: Terminal UI docs for the right-side operator panel and resize-aware shell layout.

libraries.queryHint: iterator-driven rendering, ownership across UI state, and event loop plumbing for shell panels
layout splits, side panels, tables, tabs, widgets, and responsive operator rendering
keyboard events, terminal control, resize handling, and alternate-screen behavior

rust-policy-gates.description: Fail-closed validation docs for dark-factory lint rules and catalog checks.

libraries.queryHint: validation logic, error propagation, guard clauses, and fail-closed control flow for lint gates
command gating, validation errors, argument contracts, and operator diagnostics for lint commands
policy structs, serialization constraints, and enforcement-friendly state modeling for catalog checks
config-backed policy decoding and machine-readable execution requirements for fail-closed checks

rust-trace-replay.description: Rust observability docs for trace capture, persisted artifacts, and replay validation.

libraries.queryHint: filesystem durability, structured artifacts, hashing inputs, and deterministic replay helpers for proofs
event capture, structured spans, layered subscribers, and replay-friendly instrumentation for trace replay
trace bundle serialization, pretty JSON output, and replay artifact parsing

node-typescript.description: Node.js and TypeScript runtime docs for JavaScript service and tooling work.

libraries.queryHint: runtime APIs, child processes, streams, filesystem behavior, and process lifecycle
types, declarations, module resolution, tsconfig, and compiler behavior

react-web.description: React and Next.js docs for frontend work.
